properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Waking up to a new sunrise Looking back from the other side I can see now with open eyes Darkest water and deepest pain I wouldn't trade it for anything Cause my brokenness brought me to You And these wounds are a story You'll use

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: So I'm thankful for the scars 'Cause without them I wouldn't know Your heart And I know they'll always tell of who You are So forever I am thankful for the scars

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Now I'm standing in confidence With the strength of Your faithfulness And I'm not who I was before No, I don't have to fear anymore

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I can see, I can see How You delivered me In Your hands, In Your feet I found my victory I can see, I can see How You delivered me In Your hands, In Your feet I found my victory

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I'm thankful for Your scars 'Cause without them I wouldn't know Your heart And with my life I'll tell of who You are So forever I am thankful

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I'm thankful for the scars 'Cause without them I wouldn't know Your heart And I know they'll always tell of who You are So forever I am thankful for the scars So forever I am thankful for the scars
